recentTweets.text: RT @HouseDemocrats: John Lewis was more than our esteemed friend and colleague, he was a force to be reckoned with and a powerful civil rig…
My bill bans stock trading not only by Members of Congress, but also by the President. This is why. https://t.co/XLIzuP5Z2N
Following this week’s ICE shootings of two innocent people, I am joining nearly 200 of my House colleagues in demanding accountability. https://t.co/kOyvfqFtT4
I just watched the President's speech about election security. Here are the key points: https://t.co/9RJLLhoJKI

More than 15,000 Rhode Islanders have lost food assistance since Republicans in Congress voted to cut SNAP last year.

We should be helping people put food on the table instead of giving more tax breaks to billionaires. https://t.co/mXXR5P458N

Hospitals are already feeling the impact of the deep health care cuts passed by Trump & Republicans last year.

I met with Kent County Hospital to discuss how we can protect our health care system and expand access to high-quality, affordable care for all Americans. https://t.co/oIripgRl6R

Is anybody in the administration not corrupt!?

We need to ban not only stock trading but also prediction market trading by political insiders now!
https://t.co/uqjE6ytG3W

Met with @steelworkers President @Brownrox at today’s @LaborCaucus meeting. 

I will always stand with American workers who keep our country running. https://t.co/9Ec9RrZjKb

I enjoyed talking to Rhode Island students from @NationalFFA about the need to fund agriculture career programs in high schools and colleges.

Thank you for stopping by! https://t.co/8n4cqfedhn

At a time when more young people are struggling with their mental health, school psychologists are a lifeline.

Today, I met with RI school psychologists to discuss expanding access to mental health care and ensuring educators have the support they need to help students succeed. https://t.co/g2SoiZlCpB
RT @wpri12: JUST IN: An Air Quality Alert is in effect for our entire area due to fine particles from wildfire smoke through Thursday morni…

Block Island was just named one of the best islands in the U.S. by @TravelLeisure.

They know what Rhode Islanders have always known: There is no better place to spend the summer than the Ocean State. https://t.co/0Xaj99ERVC

An Afghan ally who served alongside U.S. troops, had no criminal record, and was legally brought into the United States died within 24 hours of being taken into ICE custody.

ICE is blocking the release of the autopsy.

This is horrific. We need the autopsy results now. https://t.co/aUwvISF7Ff
https://t.co/cr9QDTB9E4

My floor speech on the latest ICE killings.

We are not going to be silent. We are not going to forget. Until there is justice. https://t.co/qjvMFweJHu
RT @tjdelsanto: We have a high risk of rip currents today at area south-facing beaches.  A rip current is a fast-moving current of water th…
Rhode Island is under a heat advisory until Wednesday at 8pm. Take steps to stay cool and keep hydrated 🧊
Two more people have been shot and killed by ICE this week. Here is what we are going to do about it. https://t.co/kUeCjm4fIs

Flooding during heavy rainfall has long been a problem in Rhode Island.

I secured more than $1 million of funding for Cranston to address flooding in the Garden Street area and I will continue to bring home federal funding to improve our state. https://t.co/0xEACXA8t3

Is it illegal? ✅
Will it raise your costs? ✅
Lack any clear strategy? ✅

Checks all of the Trump boxes.

The Work Opportunity Tax Credit helps businesses hire people who often face barriers to employment, including veterans and people living with disabilities.

I am proud to support legislation to increase the amount of the credit and expand the program to include military spouses. https://t.co/j5xpvvN9Ve

Trump and his family have made $2 billion in just one year while working people are struggling with:

The cost of healthcare
High housing costs
Rising grocery prices

This economy is working for the ultra-wealthy and the well-connected. Not working people. https://t.co/vC4XRDOFod

Congratulations to Cranston's Kevin Rodriguez on his run on American Ninja Warrior! 

Rhode Island is proud of you and will be cheering you on. https://t.co/29usIwDaPJ

For decades, residents of the Garden Street neighborhood in Cranston have dealt with severe flooding that has damaged homes and businesses.

This week, we announced $1 million of federal funding I secured to help fix this longstanding problem. https://t.co/NmVaLLo8kI

I am joining my @HomelandDems colleagues to find the truth about Lorenzo Salgado Araujo's death.

A father of 3 was shot and killed by ICE. He wasn’t the person they were looking for.

ICE’s statements don't match witness accounts. Now they're pressuring witnesses to self-deport. https://t.co/DrxPktvRtI

Nearly every country guarantees vacation time for all workers. We should too.

Let’s pass my PTO Act and finally deliver vacation fairness in the workplace! https://t.co/Nl6nRJRBvh

Rhode Island has a proud manufacturing legacy, and it continues today in towns across our state.

I enjoyed touring A&H Manufacturing in Johnston and talking about the importance of supporting the next generation of skilled manufacturing workers to keep that tradition strong. https://t.co/XhLPsOHZbw
I am honored to serve as the inaugural Vice Chair of the Historic Preservation Caucus to advocate for preserving the places that have shaped our nation's history. https://t.co/ucXI2SqwWB

High school students interested in attending one of our nation's outstanding service academies can apply for a congressional nomination through my office.

Applications are now open through October. Learn more here. ⬇️

https://t.co/0lppiHMki1 https://t.co/5tRSUbDIte
What happens in the next 48 hours will play a huge role in bringing housing costs down. https://t.co/dfcqFA7Xk6

Fans from around the world are coming to the US for the World Cup because their countries guarantee paid vacation for all workers. We need this in the US! 

That's why I introduced the PTO Act to guarantee vacation for all Americans. https://t.co/zYjV4238JS

Thank you to the residents of All American Assisted Living in Warwick for welcoming me today. To make Rhode Island better for seniors, I am focused on lowering costs, protecting the ability to retire with dignity, and ensuring older Rhode Islanders have the support they deserve. https://t.co/5q0Xx9C5fd
Back at the @CranstonSenior Center for more good conversations about the need to lower costs, improve health care and end corruption. https://t.co/ed1hAiIzdX

For decades, residents in Cranston's Garden Street area have dealt with flooding that has left behind debris and threatened homes.

Today, we celebrated $1M + I was able to secure to improve drainage and prevent future flooding. https://t.co/PPVSSAbYvl

Today I met with Rhode Islanders from the National Alliance to End Homelessness to discuss how we can better support our most vulnerable neighbors.

Everyone deserves a safe, stable place to call home. https://t.co/iC4JXOvs2U
Getting excited for @USMNT against Belgium tonight! Good luck to all the players and coaches as they attempt to make history 🇺🇸
RT @wpri12: A Flood Watch is in effect for all of our area. @tjdelsanto says to expect periods of heavy rain, especially late Monday, Monda…

We can never compromise dignity in the workplace in the face of corporate greed.

I am cosponsoring the Worker’s Rights and Support Act to guarantee for all workers:

✅A meal break every 6 hours
✅ Restroom breaks
✅ Time to attend to medical needs
Months after a Border Patrol agent shot a US citizen and lied about it, there is still no accountability. https://t.co/MF2TB8VsaF
Ancients and Horribles Parade is different. https://t.co/rvsd6TqbCy

America turns 250, and the Ancients and Horribles Parade in Chepachet turns 100!

It was great to join everyone for another year of this one-of-a-kind Rhode Island tradition. https://t.co/3K5AqR1e5F

The oldest Fourth of July parade in the country never disappoints. 🇺🇲

So meaningful to celebrate our nation's 250th anniversary with Rhode Islanders at the Bristol Fourth of July Parade. Happy 4th! https://t.co/BD46RZljRk

Happy Fourth of July! 🇺🇸

As America celebrates 250 years of independence, may we continue striving to build a country that lives up to the ideals of freedom, democracy, and opportunity for all. #America250 https://t.co/L3cgSNwhtV

Gilbert Stuart, born in Saunderstown, painted many of the heroes of the American Revolution, including the  portrait of George Washington that appears on the dollar bill.

Because of him we can better understand the past and how it shapes the present!
https://t.co/IoHlc6pejs

Nathanael Greene rose through the ranks and became one of George Washington’s trusted generals.
https://t.co/vwMLSNEu5A

Rhode Island's Second District played an outsized role in the American Revolution. 

Here, again, are five of the biggest ways RI02 helped secure American independence. 🧵

#America250
USA Today just named Providence as the 2nd most walkable city in America for the third year in a row. 🏆 https://t.co/5aOyFd3pWs

When Congress adjourned this week, I took a moment to reflect on what it means for our nation to mark 250 years.

Through every challenge and every triumph, the ideals our country was founded on have always been worth fighting for. https://t.co/FjdZleUXnB
Huge thanks to my amazing sometimes-constituents Taylor and Travis for this incredible donation. Grateful for their support for Rhode Island. https://t.co/YrniHvQMxB

How did a Rhode Island painter become one of the most lasting figures of the American Revolution?

The answer may be in your pocket.

In the latest installment of my #America250 series, I'm highlighting Gilbert Stuart and one of RI-02's great contributions to U.S. history. https://t.co/awszWjwfoy
RT @RhodeIslandEMA: Rhode Island will see a spike in temperatures the next few days. Prepare to melt, but stay cool and know the signs of h…

Thank you to the more than 10k Rhode Islanders who joined my telephone town hall tonight. 

Hearing directly from the people I represent is one of the most important parts of this job, and I'm grateful to everyone who participated and made their voices heard. https://t.co/bVbNhCiCoN

Every day a child is abused is hell for that child. 

But the Trump Admin is taking agents off of child exploitation cases to instead do immigration raids. https://t.co/bmE4kaouxu

Wishing the @USMNT luck tonight against Bosnia.

The entire country is behind you! 🇺🇸
One year after passage of the Big Ugly Bill, 8 million Americans have lost their insurance and 1 million children have lost SNAP benefits. https://t.co/o6zy7r0zm8

Still undisclosed: who bought all the Trump crypto and put $1 billion into his pocket.

When Dems are in the majority we are going to ban this bullshit.

Up next in our series on the top five ways RI-02 contributed to the American Revolution: RI native Nathanael Greene rises through the ranks to become George Washington’s most trusted general – and helps change the course of history. https://t.co/HdPP8FtLBC
RT @RhodeIslandEMA: The @NWSBoston  has issued a !!Extreme Heat Warning!! for Rhode Island beginning Wednesday 7/1/26 10:00 AM through Satu…

If you are a TPS holder who may be impacted by the Trump Administration’s immigration policies, our office can be a resource.

Call us at (401) 244-1201 or visit https://t.co/mLDJJzmGBZ to request assistance. https://t.co/CA2Mhlm0sA

Call us at (401) 244-1201 or visit https://t.co/mLDJJzmGBZ to request assistance. https://t.co/CA2Mhlm0sA

Join me for a telephone town hall tomorrow at 6:00 p.m. 

Call 833-380-0511 to participate, ask a question, and discuss the issues that matter most to you. https://t.co/9oK8a843pH
https://t.co/ASVZFMFgwo

National Parks are America's best idea.

That's why I was proud to help pass the Great American Outdoors Act through the House Natural Resources Committee to secure funding to maintain our national parks and ensure they can be enjoyed for years to come. https://t.co/kUYuLSahWW

Warning: Rhode Island is facing extreme heat this week.

Stay safe, drink water, and keep this list of cooling centers across the state handy ➡️https://t.co/tiB6YNh6oS

RI formed one of the most remarkable fighting units of the American Revolution: the 1st Rhode Island Regiment.

The next video in our series on the top five ways RI-02 contributed to the Revolution tells their story. #America250 https://t.co/hRjFCsCrnr
Have you been wondering how these European soccer fans have so much free time to follow their teams around? Here’s the answer: https://t.co/lE8QKSga7O

Our office hosted a great passport event this morning in Cranston with the Boston Passport Agency.

We were able to help process 166 applications.

If you need any further assistance from my team, visit https://t.co/N2YRuGkJ4N or call us at (401) 244-1201. https://t.co/FKUuB4LK9B
An anti-corruption movement is sweeping the country. People are tired of the shameless insider trading that allows members of Congress to trade stocks for personal gain. https://t.co/JUNkMIkOXb

The American Dream is harder to achieve today than in the past.

As housing costs rise, wages lag, and corporations make record profits, it is clear the old playbook isn't working. Time to break the corrupt system in Washington so working people can have a chance to get ahead.

The FBI warned that criminals have been impersonating ICE officers.

ICE wearing masks makes it easier for criminals to do this.

I wrote Kristi Noem about this 8 months ago and only just received this pathetic response. https://t.co/FsMEjUtj2b

Rhode Island played a major role in the American Revolution 250 years ago, establishing the first colonial navy four months before the Continental Navy was created in Philadelphia.
 
Our Top 5 #America250 series continues with a story you may not know: 👇 https://t.co/PzmyWj83f0

Eleven years ago today, the Supreme Court’s Obergefell v. Hodges decision secured marriage equality nationwide.

As we celebrate this historic victory, we must remain vigilant in defending the freedom to marry and ensuring equal rights for all Americans.

REMINDER: Our office is holding a Passport Fair on Saturday from 10:00am to 12:30pm at the Cranston Public Library.

My team and the Boston Passport Agency will be on hand to help with new passport applications, renewals, photos, and more!

Sign up here: https://t.co/7gDdU7HBYF https://t.co/ghuAHkD2au

Today I met with the RI State Nurses Association to discuss how we can address health care workforce shortages and support our nurses who help our loved ones receive the care they need. 

Thank you for stopping by my office! https://t.co/nnxRy1EMJE
Politicians have been sending other people’s children to die in the Middle East my whole life. The American people have had enough. https://t.co/um916QQDJ2
https://t.co/KF2mf51H25

Enjoyed meeting Caroline from Bay View, the winner of #RI02’s Congressional Art Competition. Her winning artwork is displayed in the United States Capitol! 

Thank you to all who participated and keep an eye out for the launch next year. https://t.co/29tpF9S1ef
Had a great meeting with the Rhode Island Music Educators Association to talk about funding for music programs in the Ocean State. https://t.co/00fdSiqaVd

Today, I rose on the House floor to honor the life of Gordon Wood, renowned historian and my former professor.

His work helps us understand how remarkable the American story truly is. https://t.co/243P4khsNP

Today marks four years since the Supreme Court’s decision to roll back abortion rights for millions of Americans.

Women deserve the right to make their own decisions about abortion, not politicians. The fight to restore Roe continues. https://t.co/XKEz90Izuu

No student should be denied the opportunity to pursue higher education because they cannot afford it.

The late RI Senator Claiborne Pell understood that.

I'm working to continue his legacy by helping make Pell grants keep pace with rising costs and protecting them from cuts. https://t.co/D8kJ85t7dI

Our government has been captured by a corrupt system that allows billionaires to raid the treasury while working people can’t afford their bills. 

I am fighting for real change. https://t.co/gIaol807tJ

Today we celebrated @JusticeA1978's new Health and Wellness Clinic in Cranston, which will help expand access to medical, dental, and behavioral health care.

Everyone deserves access to high-quality, affordable health care and this helps make that a reality. https://t.co/9BNQgL8b9t
We miss you already! Even though you drank all of our beer.

At this morning’s @ProvChamber Congressional Dialogue Breakfast, I joined my colleagues in the Delegation to discuss the need to end the unnecessary tariffs and wars, support career & tech education, and be proactive in meeting the challenges of the AI age. https://t.co/PvMbGPcpGr

Community learning centers connect people with valuable resources and create opportunities for residents of all ages.

It was great to attend the opening of the new Coventry Community Learning Center today. This project will benefit Coventry for years to come. https://t.co/aCYFVitLAd

In honor of America 250, here are 5 ways that RI-02 helped shape the American Revolution.

1️⃣ The Burning of the Gaspee. https://t.co/6BRxIz0T8f
Today, I joined Rhode Islanders at the 8th annual Juneteenth Festival to celebrate our continued promise to guarantee freedom, opportunity, and equality for all Americans. https://t.co/jTnBtvTmCi

Today marks the first day of summer & a perfect time to enjoy everything RI has to offer.

It’s also a reminder that every worker deserves time to enjoy it!

That’s why I’m fighting to pass my PTO Act to guarantee paid vacation time for all workers in America. ☀️

Refugees have long helped shape Rhode Island’s culture and economy.

Today, I joined the Refugee Dream Center in Providence for World Refugee Day to celebrate the strength, resilience, and contributions of refugees across our state. https://t.co/uYBupCJCT9

Rhode Island helped ignite the American Revolution.

Now, 250 years later, we're marking that legacy with some of the best America250 celebrations in the country. Check out the festivities and join us in celebrating our history. 🇺🇸

https://t.co/P9vhPZXOsr

Juneteenth commemorates the day the last enslaved Americans in Galveston, Texas learned they were free, marking the final chapter of slavery in the United States.
